LAST_DONE:    /admin/tenants CRUD shipped + Visual QA confirmed all flows.
              Then a slug pattern regex bug surfaced (HTML pattern attr is
              now interpreted under /v flag — ECMAScript 2024 unicodeSets).
              First fix (move hyphen to start) was insufficient — /v rejects
              bare hyphens anywhere. Second fix (escape hyphen as \-) works.
              Re-QA confirmed: dialog opens with zero console errors, prior
              valid creates persisted across rebuild, server-side zod
              continued to enforce throughout.
